productDisplayName: Baggit Women Humtum Taj Brown Wallet
description: Worry no longer about managing money, cards, mobile phone and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish three fold wallet from baggit. This timeless piece is on the top of our wishlist this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or convert it to a sling bag with the detachable shoulder strap. Dimensions: 14 cm x 11 cm Created from genuine leather A flap over the main flap with a magnetic closure, securing a pocket Main flap has two press buttons to secure the three folds Side pocket Two card holder slots and two pockets on the left fold One pocket and one slot with a photo id holder on the centre fold A zippered pocket at the back Care Wipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
